# Vicor — 800V DC Modules for ADC
Last updated: 2026-03-25

## BCM6135 — AVAILABLE NOW, HIGHEST DENSITY
- 800V-to-48V bus converter module
- >97% efficiency
- 3,400 W/in3 (INDUSTRY BEST power density)
- 3.8 kW per module
- 61x35x7.4mm CM-ChiP package, 58g
- Bidirectional
- ~$80-150/module at distribution
- ORDERABLE TODAY: Mouser, DigiKey
